project: Solo Compass iOS MVP — Quality Pass

stories.name: Map-First Full-Screen Map
stories.description: Verify and harden: map rendering, warm beige style, location permission flow, scroll/zoom, no tabs/drawer.
stories.acceptance: map fills screen, location permission flow works, warm beige base visible, no UI chrome beyond filter+info bar

stories.name: Experience Markers — 6 visual states + edge cases
stories.description: Verify all 6 states render correctly. Edge cases: 0 experiences, 50+ experiences, cluster behavior, overlapping markers, rapid state transitions.
stories.acceptance: All 6 marker states distinct and correct. Map handles 0 and 50+ gracefully. No crash on rapid tap.

stories.name: Filter Bar — polish + edge cases
stories.description: Verify: Now/All toggle, category filtering, empty state after filter, filter+scroll combination, rapid filter switching, accessibility labels.
stories.acceptance: All filters work. Empty state handled. Rapid switching doesn't crash. VoiceOver labels correct.

stories.name: Experience Card — animation + haptics
stories.description: Polish card animation, haptic feedback, swipe gesture responsiveness, card content overflow handling (long titles, many inconveniences), dark mode.
stories.acceptance: Card slides smoothly. Haptic on open. Swipe works from any position. Long content scrolls. Dark mode looks correct.

stories.name: Experience Detail — completeness check
stories.description: Verify all sections render: hero, whyItMatters, howTo (checkable), inconveniences, soloScore, bestTimes, sources, nearby, action buttons. Handle missing optional fields.
stories.acceptance: Every section renders. Optional fields gracefully hidden. Favorite/MarkDone toggle and persist. Nearby carousel scrolls.

stories.name: Bottom Info Bar — real time simulation
stories.description: Verify dynamic text for all 4 time periods (morning/afternoon/evening/night). Smooth transitions. Solo count display. Weather-aware text if implemented.
stories.acceptance: All 4 time periods show correct text. Text transitions animate. Solo count updates. Graceful when location unavailable.

stories.name: Voice Button — full flow test
stories.description: Verify: permission denied flow, recording animation, transcript capture, AI intent parsing, map refresh after voice. Error states: no internet, no permission, silent recording.
stories.acceptance: Permission flow works. Recording animation pulses. Transcript captured. Map refreshes post-voice. All error states handled.

stories.name: GPS Check-in — geofence + feedback loop
stories.description: Verify: geofence triggers on arrival, timer starts, departure detection, feedback prompt, 30s voice capture, background mode.
stories.acceptance: Arrival detected. Feedback prompt on departure. Voice captured. Location permission denied handled gracefully.

stories.name: User Share — long-press map flow
stories.description: Verify: long press triggers prompt, coordinate capture, voice recording, AI structuring, candidate marker appears, distinct icon.
stories.acceptance: Long press shows prompt. Voice recording works. Candidate marker appears with distinct icon. Error handling for failed AI structuring.

stories.name: AI Layer — error handling + retry + caching
stories.description: Add: retry logic with exponential backoff, response caching (5min TTL), error states in UI (no network, rate limited, invalid key), loading skeletons.
stories.acceptance: Retry on transient failure. Cache prevents redundant calls. Error states shown in UI (not crashes). Loading states present.

stories.name: Confidence Display — tap detail + signal breakdown
stories.description: Verify confidence dot renders on all views. Tap gesture shows signal breakdown. Health status color mapping correct. Age-based fading works.
stories.acceptance: Confidence dot visible on markers and cards. Tap shows signal count. Colors match health status. 'mayBeGone' after 60d.

stories.name: CI/CD hardening + Xcode project gen
stories.description: Fix CI to handle missing Xcode project (generate placeholder). Add project.yml for XcodeGen. Ensure TS CI only runs on packages/* changes. Add cache for pnpm.
stories.acceptance: CI green when billing unlocked. XcodeGen config creates valid project. TS CI skips for iOS-only changes. pnpm cache speeds up runs.
